## What does this PR do?

<!-- One sentence summary -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / dependencies
- [ ] `ci` — pipeline changes
- [ ] `breaking` — breaks existing interface

## Checklist

- [ ] `terraform fmt` passes
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes
- [ ] `tflint` passes with no warnings
- [ ] `checkov` passes or findings are accepted with justification
- [ ] Module README.md updated via terraform-docs
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (run `cz changelog`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or internal hostnames committed
- [ ] Tests or examples updated if behaviour changed
